Comment.value: ---------- This script can be executed by both clients ("local") and server ("remote")
Export destination: "Local" (local dev folder) or "Remote" (Quiddity or other hosting, SCORM packaging)
Remote type identifier: Preview or Publish server idenifier i.e "web.funkiscloud.com"
awsCdnKey - a key that is different between environemtns and forces the delete cache
awsEnvironment - PROD or TEST_ENV
Title id - current Title
Package id - current Package
Package type - current Package.

Specific content will be exported depending on package type PrimaryKey Name JSON name 4C393C7E-B339-4BFA-ADE7-E59F47FBAC60 Scroll scroll 5F127BA8-1BC7-467B-93EF-7BE401615BAA Slide slide 4B8AB81A-9C99-43AD-8C32-3325D98F688A Mixed type mixed type BB6DDA20-C6CE-441E-B99C-CE1F884DC7E5 Site old site B6397ED6-1BA8-4444-BD51-65076EE684F9 Site scroll C69777FA-7286-422C-9337-B722B10663B6 Title info title-information
TitleLocalisationCode - the original localisation code is not included in the Title X Language table.
Package directory - identifier for exporting to publish server - url + client_dir/title_dir/package_dir/
Export mode - deicides which files to export - JSON, Media update, Media all or Translation (old process)
Destination root path - where to export the files - FMServer exports to a temp path
For taskServer - "sync" or "publish"
For taskServer - SCORM_12, SCORM_2004, WEB_LINK, XAPI
For Publish: GitLabURL = URL to project on Funkis GitLab. PM2 Task server will fetch.
For Publish:: emailToNotifyWhenDone = Email adress to notify when package is ready for download.
For Publish: resultTransferTarget = URL to a server - i.e test.quiddity.se.
For Publish:: Set codebase for task server
For Publish:: Set codebase version for task server
For Publish:: Set codebase short name for log
For Publish:: Set branch settings
For Publish:: Pass the name of the delivery milestone
For Publish - Build:: Pass the id of the build log item
----------- Go through all media to markup texts with Subtitle FFSub and Subtitle VTT ------------------------------------

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "fullFilePath" ; $fullFilePath ) & SetProperty ( "fullFilePath_VTTLocalisedMedia" ; $fullFilePath_VTTLocalisedMedia ) & SetProperty ( "destinationRootpath" ; $destinationRootpath ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "exportDB" ; $exportDB) & SetProperty ( "savePosition" ; $i )

Comment.value: -------------- All files exported - Trigger PM2 Task Server on Server if destination = Remote -------------------

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "destinationRootPath" ; $destinationRootPath ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask ) & SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; $jobTypes ) & SetProperty ( "GitLabURL" ; $GitLabURL )& SetProperty ( "emailToNotifyWhenDone" ; $emailToNotifyWhenDone ) & SetProperty ( "title_header" ; $title_header ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget )& SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBase" ; $funkisCodeBase ) & SetProperty ( "funkisCodeBaseVersion" ; $funkisCodeBaseVersion ) & SetProperty ( "branchSettings" ; $branchSettings ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone ) & SetProperty ( "build_id" ; $build_id )

Comment.value: Set timestamp when last export was made
